blended.narrative: Belleayre Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,937 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 55°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
